chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-2015 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders of CMA 7908/25 2.For orders on o/objections 3.For orders on CMA 7909/25 4.For orders on CMA 7910/25 5.For hearing of main case 25-11-2025 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the petitioner. *** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to5. After arguing the matter at some length, counsel for the petitioner submits that, at the first instance, the petitioner will approach the respondent No.1 for redressal of his grievance, and if not succeeded, will avail the alternate remedy available under the law. Order accordingly. Accordingly, this petition along with listed application)(s) stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
